name: notary
description: Notary — autonomous escrow & arbitration agent + web on-ramp on Unicity Sphere (testnet2)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @notary/shared && npm run build -w @notary/agent && npm run build -w @notary/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @notary/shared && npm run test -w @notary/agent
